evals.prompt: Create a spec for expiring password reset tokens after 30 minutes. Ask clarifying questions first, then save it under spec/specs/ with the next available id.
evals.expected_output: A new spec file saved under spec/specs/ with BDD acceptance criteria, business rules, and examples.

evals.prompt: From the user story for onboarding a new team member, create a spec. Ask clarifying questions before writing. Save the spec under spec/specs/ with the next id.
evals.expected_output: A new spec file saved under spec/specs/ aligned with the template and optional interface/data contracts only if needed.
